_comment: Committed sample for the Saved-places layer. The backend (/saved) overrides this at runtime; this keeps the layer alive offline / with no backend.

properties.name: Boca Chica Basin
properties.note: Quiet in an easterly, good sand holding — watch the shoal on entry.

properties.name: Stock Island provisioning
properties.note: Best all-round shelter + full services. Saturday market.

properties.name: Sand Key reef
properties.note: Snorkel the reef in good light, slack tide only.
